queries.question: what descriptions of services are associated with each real estate agency?
queries.sql: SELECT Services.description  from Real_Estate_Agencies_Services join Services on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.service_id = Services.service_id join Real_Estate_Agencies on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.real_estate_agency_id = Real_Estate_Agencies.agency_id   GROUP BY Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.service_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.real_estate_agency_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Real_Estate_Agencies)

queries.question: what descriptions of services are associated with each real estate agency?
queries.sql: select real_estate_agencies.name , services.description from Real_Estate_Agencies_Services join Services on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.service_id = Services.service_id join Real_Estate_Agencies on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.real_estate_agency_id = Real_Estate_Agencies.agency_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?real_estate_agencies_services a :Real_Estate_Agencies_Services .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?real_estate_agencies_services p:hasServices ?services .
  ?real_estate_agencies a :Real_Estate_Agencies .
  ?real_estate_agencies_services p:hasReal_Estate_Agencies ?real_estate_agencies .
  ?real_estate_agencies p:name ?name .
  ?services p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For every real estate agency, list the prices of services provided.
queries.sql: select real_estate_agencies.name , services.price from Real_Estate_Agencies_Services join Services on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.service_id = Services.service_id join Real_Estate_Agencies on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.real_estate_agency_id = Real_Estate_Agencies.agency_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?price WHERE {
  ?real_estate_agencies_services a :Real_Estate_Agencies_Services .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?real_estate_agencies_services p:hasServices ?services .
  ?real_estate_agencies a :Real_Estate_Agencies .
  ?real_estate_agencies_services p:hasReal_Estate_Agencies ?real_estate_agencies .
  ?real_estate_agencies p:name ?name .
  ?services p:price ?price .
}

queries.question: For each real estate agency, show the prices and descriptions of services that they offer.
queries.sql: select real_estate_agencies.name , services.description , services.price from Real_Estate_Agencies_Services join Services on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.service_id = Services.service_id join Real_Estate_Agencies on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.real_estate_agency_id = Real_Estate_Agencies.agency_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description ?price WHERE {
  ?real_estate_agencies_services a :Real_Estate_Agencies_Services .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?real_estate_agencies_services p:hasServices ?services .
  ?real_estate_agencies a :Real_Estate_Agencies .
  ?real_estate_agencies_services p:hasReal_Estate_Agencies ?real_estate_agencies .
  ?real_estate_agencies p:name ?name .
  ?services p:description ?description .
  ?services p:price ?price .
}

queries.question: What are the prices of services common to all real estate agencies?
queries.sql: SELECT Services.price  from Real_Estate_Agencies_Services join Services on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.service_id = Services.service_id join Real_Estate_Agencies on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.real_estate_agency_id = Real_Estate_Agencies.agency_id   GROUP BY Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.service_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.real_estate_agency_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Real_Estate_Agencies)

queries.question: What are the prices and descriptions of services common to all real estate agencies?
queries.sql: SELECT Services.description, Services.price  from Real_Estate_Agencies_Services join Services on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.service_id = Services.service_id join Real_Estate_Agencies on Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.real_estate_agency_id = Real_Estate_Agencies.agency_id   GROUP BY Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.service_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Real_Estate_Agencies_Services.real_estate_agency_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Real_Estate_Agencies)

ambiguous_dsl.question: what descriptions of services are associated with each real estate agency?
Show me the prices of services each real estate agency provides.
Give me the prices and descriptions of services that each real estate agency offers.
